confirmation_method: Static source inspection; Drupal runtime/bootstrap unavailable in local shell.

overview.purpose: GoTripzee Drupal Commerce travel booking site with catalog products for packages, stays, cabs, trips/weekend trips, OTP login/verification, Razorpay payment integration, Webforms, Views, and custom Tripzee theme.
overview.architecture: Drupal 10 recommended-project using repository root as web root; custom modules in modules/custom; custom theme in themes/custom/tripzee; active configuration export in config/sync; front-end libraries vendored under libraries.

modules.name: cab_booking
modules.label: Cab Booking
modules.description: Custom module to simplify the cab booking.

modules.name: drupal_commerce_razorpay
modules.label: Commerce Razorpay
modules.description: Provides Commerce integration for the Razorpay Payments.

modules.name: mobile_verify
modules.label: Mobile Number Verification
modules.description: Verifiy mobile number on user registration using a system-generated OTP.

modules.name: multiple_dates
modules.label: Multiple Dates
modules.description: Multiple Dates form element using the jQuery UI datetimepicker.

modules.name: package_booking
modules.label: Package Booking
modules.description: Custom module to check unavailability of packages based on selected dates.

modules.name: room_booking
modules.label: Room Booking
modules.description: Custom module to simplify the room booking.

modules.name: simple_login
modules.label: Simple Login
modules.description: Allows users to log in using a system-generated OTP code instead of a password.

modules.name: weekend_trip_booking
modules.label: Weekend Trip Booking
modules.description: Custom module to simplify the weekend trip booking.

themes.name: tripzee
themes.label: Tripzee
themes.description: A clean, accessible, and flexible customised front end theme developed for GoTripzee

controllers.business_logic_summary: Reads plugin_id from POST data, creates Commerce payment gateway plugin instance, calls onNotify($request), throws on failed verification.
Redirects to Commerce payment checkout return route with commerce_order parameter hardcoded to 1.
Generates mobile verification OTP via Textlocal SMS and returns JSON.
Generates OTP, resets/creates user password, sends Textlocal SMS, returns JSON.

confirmed: No custom services.yml files were found under modules/custom.
No custom tests were found under modules/custom or themes/custom.
Custom booking modules use hook_form_alter and hook_commerce_order_item_presave style procedural code.
Razorpay integration includes a Commerce payment gateway plugin plus custom /capturePayment and /payment/ipn-handler routes.
simple_login and mobile_verify both declare /generate-otp POST routes, creating a route path collision at the URL level.
potential_issues: Booking availability checks call loadMultiple() on commerce_order storage and then iterate all completed orders; this is a potential performance hotspot on large order volumes.
Several routes declare _access TRUE or only CSRF token requirements; access posture should be reviewed against intended exposure.
OTP login resets user passwords to numeric OTPs and logs generated OTP values.
cab_booking_old.module contains older duplicate cab booking logic and dpm() debug usage.
assumptions: Database tables for config entities and fields are inferred from Drupal entity/field storage conventions because no SQL dump or Drupal runtime schema inspection is present.
Entity business purposes are inferred from bundle names, labels, fields, and templates.
